$schema: v2 memory extraction corpus — drives the M1 gate-chain bake-off. Each case is a single user utterance plus the expected tier-write candidates the gate chain should produce. Names use pop-culture characters per CLAUDE.md mock-data rule. Phase status: empty in M0; populate to ≥130 cases in M1 per docs/MEMORY_DESIGN.md §8 M1 corpus.

case_schema.context: object — optional pipeline context (recent_entities, session_id, etc.)

expect.should_write: boolean — true if the gate chain should produce ≥1 candidate

candidates.subject: string — 'self' or a person name
candidates.predicate: string — must be in the closed enum

expect.denied_by_gate: string|null — one of: clause_shape, subject, predicate, schema, intent
